candidate_check.description: Online revocation checks must be performed.

check_content_excerpt:
The policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Enable online OCSP/CRL checks" must be set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge

If the value for "EnableOnlineRevocationChecks" is not set to "REG_DWORD = 1", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Enable online OCSP/CRL checks" to "Enabled".
title: Online revocation checks must be performed.
